aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation for AEO with localized service pages and contact information but lacks significant content depth, user engagement, and review signals.
quick_wins: Generate and showcase customer reviews to build trust and improve local search presence.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, location-specific pages, and FAQ sections.
Implement a blog to target long-tail keywords and establish authority in the HVAC niche.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a good presence in its primary service area but lacks broader geographic targeting and depth in location-specific content.
critical_issues: No dedicated location pages for each city mentioned.
Lack of localized content and keywords to improve regional search visibility.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website but lacks citations across major directories and local listings.
action_items: Create and verify Google Business Profile listing.
List the business on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and industry-specific platforms.
Ensure consistent NAP information across all online platforms and citations.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement signals
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in the broader New Jersey area
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and creating localized content
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority through content marketing and partnerships with local organizations

page_title: Heating Repair, AC Service, Furnace Service & AC Repair | Jersey City, NJ, Hoboken, NJ, Union City, NJ & Hackensack, NJ | Aeromark Mechanical Inc
